zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Preuilly de Vendôme於1150年出生在法國崔洛易-吉黑波旁_時，她的父親Bouchard de VENDÔME IV26歲，母親Agathe De Lavardin16歲。她於1165年與Hardouin de Maillé III在法國崔洛易-吉黑波旁_結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1201年在法國崔英德-吉洛易麥利艾享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Preuilly de Vendôme was born in 1150, in Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, her father, Bouchard de VENDÔME IV, was 26 and her mother, Agathe De Lavardin, was 16. She married Hardouin de Maillé III in 1165, in Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1201, in Maillé, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Preuilly de Vendôme est née en 1150, à Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, son père, Bouchard de VENDÔME IV, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agathe De Lavardin, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Hardouin de Maillé III en 1165, à Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1201, à Maillé, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France, à l’âge de 51 ans.

Sie hat 1165 in Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich Hardouin de Maillé III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1201 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Maillé, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Frankreich.

Lei sposato Hardouin de Maillé III nel 1165, nel Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1201, nel Maillé, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia, all'età di 51 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Preuilly de Vendôme(이)가 1150년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 븐드o에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bouchard de VENDÔME IV(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agathe De Lavardin(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1165년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 븐드o에서 Hardouin de Maillé III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1201년 프랑스 세트르 인드레-트-로이르 메이e에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Preuilly de Vendôme родилась в 1150 г. в местности вендoм, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция, её отцу по имени Bouchard de VENDÔME IV было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agathe De Lavardin, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hardouin de Maillé III в 1165 г. в местности вендoм, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1201 г. в местности меиллe, индре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция в возрасте 51 год.
